guide: This needs Combat 15 and a completion
of the previous floor to enter.
To efficiently grind this, you should
get help from Party Finder/Friends.
Ideally you'd want Ender Set
with a Void Sword for this.
You can get easy contribution for
this by breaking some Wheat in the Hub.
If you want faster contribution,
make a Sugar Cane farm in your Garden
which will also be needed for another goal.
Do your daily experiments in the Experimentation Table,
always do the highest tier you can.
For this you need access to the Dwarven Mines
and a combat set like Ender Armor and a Void Sword.
You'll get progress in this while going for
a Golden Goblin.
You should use SkyHanni's Trapper features
to make this easier. Use /warp trapper
to get back to Trevor whenever you want.
You will need a bow for this.
You will most likely get this
from leveling up skills.
Remember to actually put the money
you get in the Bank :)
You will get the Rock Pet by mining 2.5k
Ore Blocks. Keep in mind that Stone doesn't
count for this. Don't forget to equip the pet ;)
For this it is recommended to fish in The Park
during rain while using the best fishing gear
you have access to.
Buy a Dirt Bottle (100k) from the Smithmonger in the Hub
and reforge a weapon with it.
Make sure to NOT shift-click it out
of the menu after applying!
This unlocks at 5k Iron Collection and requires
240 Enchanted Iron to craft. You'll want to
use Pure Iron Veins for this and get as much
Mining Speed/Spread and Fortune as you can.
You'll want to use the free
Combat XP from Bestiary Milestones for this
aswell as the XP from /mobtypes.
Kill Chickens in The Barn to unlock Chicken Minions.
Craft as many minions as you can
and place them on your island. Give them the best fuel
and storage that you have access to and collect in time.
To help with this, try to make bigger crafts
by hand for Carpentry levels.
Also do your daily experiments and make sure
to have a pet active at all times
(any pet works, even level 100).

note: Kill a t2 Slayer Boss under 80s
guide: Recommended for this either Revenant Horror II
or Tarantula Broodfather II. Use your Ender Armor
and Void Sword (200k) for this.
Kill goblins or open loot chests in the Crystal Hollows,
then just throw them until you get a Golden Goblin.
Higher level eggs have higher chances of spawning,
but are also rarer to get.
Kill Rabbits in The Desert to unlock Rabbit Minions.
Craft as many minions as you can
and place them on your island. Give them the best fuel
and storage that you have access to and collect in time.
List of more than 12 talismans:
Buy all 6 Talismans from the Adventurer in The Hub (26k)
Collection Talismans:
Farming Talisman, Vaccine Talisman,
Gravity Talisman, Talisman of Coins, Magnetic Talisman,
Wood Affinity Talisman, Speed Talisman, Potion Affinity Talisman
Others:
Archaeologists Compass, Mediocre Ring of Love, King Talisman,
Campfire Initiate Badge, Cat Talisman, Spider Talisman,
Don't forget to take the 4 Bonus accessory bag slots from
the Redstone Miner, he needs 1920 Redstone in total.
The easiest solution here would be
to craft a Wheat Minion t11 (163.632 Wheat).
Utilize the Garden and its pests
to obtain the needed resources.
For this you'll only need to get
Bingo, Grandma Wolf and a Bee pet.
Do your daily Experimentation Tables
after getting Enchanting Level 10.
Get yourself a splash, equip a Bingo Pet
and get the cake buff by eating the cakes
on skyerzz's or prtl's island.
If this doesn't finish it, get a Void Sword (200k) in the End
and hold it while some Ender Armor and/or Equipment.
Craft Leather, Iron, Gold and Diamond Armor
Craft Leaflet, Farm Suit, Mushroom, Cactus
and Pumpkin Armor.
Buy Squire, Rosetta's and Celeste Armor
from Rosetta aswell as Angler Armor
(8 pieces) from the Fishing Merchant,
Chainmail Armor from the Iron Forger and
Canopy Armor from Amaury. You should also
collect the armor from the Foraging Questline.
Talk to Guildford in the Dungeon Hub
and complete 4/4 objectives of any race.
Don't forget to talk to Guildford
after each run you do.
You will get some progress for this
by working on other goals.
The easiest to go for are:
Birch/Oak/Jungle/Spruce/Acacia/Dark Oak Wood,
Iron, Sand, Wheat and Seeds.
